title: Iron Lodestone Backport 1.20.X
description: 25w02a lodestone iron ingot crafting recipe for older versions
body:
![iron lodestone backport title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7a74400e44caf5ec615c1ca5a6db4e441ba8485.png)
# _"Now you can craft the lodestone with iron ingots!"_
![lodestone recipe with iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5db7a769eefb069ca47639bdd67fd0b018905183.jpeg)
- **25w02a Lodestone Crafting recipe, wich uses iron ingots instead of netherite ones.**
